overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk lounge in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves through a neon-lit bar with curved glass architecture, past patrons and bartenders, and exits onto a bustling urban street before descending to a lower level. The scene features vibrant pink and cyan neon lighting against a dark night sky.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a futuristic cyberpunk lounge featuring a curved glass canopy with vibrant pink and cyan neon lighting. Circular seating booths with glowing cocktail tables line the space, while holographic billboards on distant skyscrapers are visible through the transparent roof.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the bar area featuring an illuminated counter with backlit bottle shelves glowing in cyan. A bartender serves drinks while patrons stand at the bar, and the curved glass canopy arches overhead to the right.

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the lounge past groups of seated patrons on curved couches. A vertical garden wall with lush greenery lines the left side while the camera approaches the exit ramp leading to the street.

events.description: beginning descent down the ramp to lower pedestrian level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered lounge onto a bustling Night City street lined with towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The camera moves toward a ramp descending to a lower level, with a distinctive yellow storefront visible at the bottom.

concrete wall with hexagonal patterned vents

segments.scene_description: Descending a covered ramp with teal railings into a lower pedestrian area. The wet concrete reflects the ambient city lights, leading toward a distinctive yellow storefront with a black-and-white checkered floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a neon-lit cyberpunk lounge out into the bustling, multi-leveled streets of Night City. It begins beneath a curved glass canopy illuminated by pink and cyan lights, gliding past glowing cocktail tables and holographic billboards visible through the roof. As the camera moves deeper into the lounge, it passes an illuminated bar counter with backlit cyan shelves and a vertical garden wall before approaching the exit. The scene then opens from the sheltered interior onto a vibrant urban street dominated by towering holographic advertisements, moving toward a descending ramp. Finally, the camera glides down the ramp past teal railings and over wet, reflective concrete, arriving at a lower pedestrian level featuring a distinctive yellow storefront with a checkered floor.
